title: ABB India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ABB India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ABB India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About ABB India:
ABB India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ABB India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
